channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-12 11:28 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Starship and Super Heavy move out to continue preflight testing
item.description: Starship and Super Heavy move out to continue preflight testing

item.title: @elonmusk: “Jurassic Park” was legit an epic idea by Crichton. I really hope we can have one in the future. Got...
item.description: “Jurassic Park” was legit an epic idea by Crichton. I really hope we can have one in the future. Got to break some eggs to make an omelette 🤷‍♂️

item.title: @elonmusk: Andy is totally right. It kills the magic of the story if you can feel some “social justice” asshole...
item.description: Andy is totally right. It kills the magic of the story if you can feel some “social justice” asshole manipulating the scenario.

item.title: @elonmusk: The Biden administration actively flew illegals into America with no vetting of their violent crimin...
item.description: The Biden administration actively flew illegals into America with no vetting of their violent criminal past into America and paid for their flights via NGOs. This is a war crime. Mayorkas and his buddies orchestrated this and should be on trial for their diabolical deeds.

item.title: @elonmusk: The vaccine dosage was obviously too high and done too many times. I had the original Wuhan virus be...
item.description: The vaccine dosage was obviously too high and done too many times. I had the original Wuhan virus before there was any vaccine and it was much like any other cold/flu. Bad, but not terrible. But my second vaccine shot almost sent me to the hospital. Felt like I was dying.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink has done more than any NGO to lift people out of poverty by connecting them with a means of...
item.description: Starlink has done more than any NGO to lift people out of poverty by connecting them with a means of education and a market for their good & services via the Internet

item.title: @elonmusk: Leftists will be like “define what a chair is” and when you give an answer, they’ll tear it to piece...
item.description: Leftists will be like “define what a chair is” and when you give an answer, they’ll tear it to pieces and then claim chairs don’t exist even as they’re sitting in one. No one has to play these word games. We all know what an Englishman is. You know too, which is why you constantly attack the concept in the first place.

item.title: @elonmusk: Restore Britain would allow free public speech without imprisonment
item.description: Restore Britain would allow free public speech without imprisonment

item.title: @elonmusk: If this was against any other race. There'd be political and legacy media uproar. We see who says an...
item.description: If this was against any other race. There'd be political and legacy media uproar. We see who says and does what in these times.

item.title: @elonmusk: Is Elon Musk right about Sam Altman? just read the new Ronan Farrow and Andrew Marantz piece on Sam ...
item.description: Is Elon Musk right about Sam Altman? just read the new Ronan Farrow and Andrew Marantz piece on Sam Altman in The New Yorker, and it is damning. And the answer is yes. It’s a deep dive based on never-before-seen 70-page memos from Ilya Sutskever and interviews with over a hundred people. The reporting revives the 2023 board drama where Altman was fired for not being “consistently candid,” only to get reinstated in days after employee pressure and Microsoft backing. But the real story is the pattern that led to it: repeated claims that Altman misrepresents facts, downplays safety issues, and tells people whatever they want to hear while steering OpenAI away from its original nonprofit safety mission toward aggressive commercialization, government deals, and power consolidation. Basically, he’s a lot like ChatGPT. Dishonest and sycophantic. From Sutskever’s memos and board discussions: “Sam exhibits a consistent pattern of… Lying.” And his direct warning: “I don’t think Sam is the guy who should have his finger on the button.” On the firing call, Altman reportedly said, “This is just so fucked up… I can’t change my personality.” A board member took it as him admitting he lies and isn’t going to stop. Altman later told the New Yorker authors: “In the past, my main flaw as a manager had been my eagerness to avoid conflict. Now I’m very happy to fire people quickly.”On integrity: “Yes, [AI] demands a heightened level of integrity, and I feel the weight of the responsibility every day.” One former colleague summed up the skepticism: “His words were almost certainly bullshit.”

item.title: @elonmusk: South Africa won’t allow Starlink to be licensed, even though I was BORN THERE, simply because I am ...
item.description: South Africa won’t allow Starlink to be licensed, even though I was BORN THERE, simply because I am not Black! We were offered many times the opportunity to bribe our way to a license by pretending that a Black guy runs Starlink SA, but I have refused to do so on principle. Racism should not be rewarded no matter to which race it is applied. Shame on the racist politicians in South Africa. They should be shown no respect whatsoever anywhere in the world and shunned for being unashamedly RACISTS!
